tasks.title: Build lead scoring pipeline
tasks.description: Implement an AI-driven lead scoring system that analyzes X engagement, funding data, and company signals to rank prospects automatically.

tasks.title: Design Mission Control dashboard layout
tasks.description: Create the main dashboard view with Kanban board, calendar widget, team status panel, and project overview cards. Use dark theme with accent colors.

tasks.title: Automate client onboarding questionnaire
tasks.description: Build an automated intake flow that collects client goals, ICP details, existing tech stack, and content preferences via a conversational AI form.

tasks.title: Write X thread on AI agent workflows
tasks.description: Draft and schedule a high-value thread breaking down how our AI agents handle end-to-end sales outreach. Include metrics and real examples.

tasks.title: Integrate Stripe billing for client subscriptions
tasks.description: Set up Stripe integration to handle monthly retainer billing, usage-based add-ons, and automated invoice generation for agency clients.

tasks.title: Train research agent on funding data sources
tasks.description: Fine-tune the lead research sub-agent to pull and synthesize data from Crunchbase, PitchBook alternatives, and SEC filings for prospect enrichment.

tasks.title: Create weekly KPI reporting template
tasks.description: Build an automated weekly report that pulls metrics from all projects: leads generated, content engagement, revenue pipeline, and agent uptime.

tasks.title: Set up outreach sequence for Series A startups
tasks.description: Design a multi-touch outreach campaign targeting recently funded Series A startups. Include personalized X DMs, email sequences, and follow-up cadence.

tasks.title: Implement real-time agent status monitoring
tasks.description: Add WebSocket-based live status updates for all AI agents in the dashboard, showing current task, uptime, error rates, and throughput.

tasks.title: Draft case study from Meridian Labs engagement
tasks.description: Write a detailed case study based on the Meridian Labs pilot: problem statement, solution architecture, results (3x pipeline increase), and testimonial.
